entities.name: HELIOTHIS ARMIGERA
entities.description: Male moths targeted for monitoring using pheromone traps

entities.name: SEX PHEROMONE TRAPPING
entities.description: A system for monitoring male moths using synthetic sex pheromone attractants

entities.name: SYNTHETIC SEX PHEROMONE
entities.description: A chemical attractant used to lure male moths into traps

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, located in Patancheru, India

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the trapping system was developed and implemented

entities.name: VIRGIN FEMALES
entities.description: Initial baits used for attracting male moths before synthetic pheromones

entities.name: TROPICAL PRODUCTS INSTITUTE OF LONDON
entities.description: The organization that provided synthetic pheromone mixtures

entities.name: RUBBER SEPTA
entities.description: Material used for pheromone adsorption that proved more attractive than polythene vials

entities.name: RUBBER BURETTE STOPPERS
entities.description: Standard lures used for pheromone adsorption

entities.name: DRY TRAPS
entities.description: A category of traps evaluated for effectiveness

entities.name: FUNNEL TRAPS
entities.description: A type of dry trap found to be more effective than sticky traps

entities.name: STICKY TRAPS
entities.description: A type of trap found to be less effective than dry funnel traps

entities.name: WHITE FUNNEL TRAP
entities.description: The most efficient trap design adopted as the ICRISAT standard

entities.name: PERFORATED BAFFLE
entities.description: A component added around the lure to increase moth catches

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A crop where traps were placed above the canopy to catch moths

entities.name: MILLET
entities.description: A crop where traps were placed above the canopy to catch moths

entities.description: A crop where traps were placed above the canopy to catch moths

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A crop where traps were placed above the canopy to catch moths

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A crop where traps were placed above the canopy to catch moths

entities.name: DICHLORVOS
entities.description: A fumigant used to kill moths in the traps

entities.name: INDIAN SUBCONTINENT
entities.description: The region where H. armigera populations and movements are studied
